title: At least eight dead in train collision that sparks bus fire in Thailand | CNN
text:
Source: Reuters

At least eight people were killed and 25 ‚Äãothers injured after a ‚Äåtrain collision triggered a fire that engulfed a public bus in ‚ÄãBangkokon Saturday, rescue officials ‚Äãand police said.

Firefighters and rescue ‚Å†crews were dispatched as ‚Äãflames engulfed the bus and nearby ‚Äãvehicles, they said, adding the crash involved a train, the bus, cars ‚Äãand motorcycles.

Rescue teams worked ‚Äãto pull injured victims from the wreckage ‚Äåas ‚Å†fire crews battled the blaze with water hoses in a race to contain the fire, ‚Äãofficials ‚Äãsaid.

The fire ‚Å†has now been brought under control, with ‚Äãcrews cooling the area, ‚Äãventing ‚Å†gas and continuing to search for victims, they said.
